context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the mix-tasks-generators instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Always call `Mix.Task.run("app.start")` in tasks that need the application started

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Create custom tasks for project-specific workflows; don't override standard Mix tasks

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: mix my_app.migrate up      - Run migrations

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Create the file** at `lib/mix/tasks/<namespace>.<task_name>.ex`

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify registration** — run `mix help | grep my_app` to confirm the task is listed

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Write tests** using `Mix.Project.in_project/4` (see Testing section below)
